style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a balanced exchange. On the left, a column headed THE ORGANIZATION lists four small stacked boxes: TRAINING, TOOLS, CONTENT, OPPORTUNITY, with an arrow pointing right. On the right, a column headed STAFF lists two small stacked boxes: OPEN-MINDEDNESS, COMMITMENT TO LEARN, with an arrow pointing left. The two arrows meet at a central rounded node labelled THE COMPACT. From that node, a single arrow leads downward to a wider box labelled EMPOWERED WORKFORCE. Balanced and symmetrical. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: column heading 'L'ORGANISATION' (FORMATION, OUTILS, CONTENU, OCCASION); column heading 'LE PERSONNEL' (OUVERTURE D'ESPRIT, ENGAGEMENT À APPRENDRE); central node 'LE PACTE'; box 'EFFECTIF AUTONOMISÉ'. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a balanced exchange. On the left, a column headed THE ORGANIZATION lists four small stacked boxes: TRAINING, TOOLS, CONTENT, OPPORTUNITY, with an arrow pointing right. On the right, a column headed STAFF lists two small stacked boxes: OPEN-MINDEDNESS, COMMITMENT TO LEARN, with an arrow pointing left. The two arrows meet at a central rounded node labelled THE COMPACT. From that node, a single arrow leads downward to a wider box labelled EMPOWERED WORKFORCE. Balanced and symmetrical. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: column heading 'L'ORGANISATION' (FORMATION, OUTILS, CONTENU, OCCASION); column heading 'LE PERSONNEL' (OUVERTURE D'ESPRIT, ENGAGEMENT À APPRENDRE); central node 'LE PACTE'; box 'EFFECTIF AUTONOMISÉ'.
